assertionsSummary.note: Documentation milestone features (README, ARCHITECTURE, client integration docs) have no testable assertions - they produce documentation, not executable code with user-facing behavior to validate.

notes: All documentation milestone features produce documentation artifacts (README.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, client integration docs) rather than functional code. The functional assertions (VAL-*) were already validated in earlier milestones (foundation, tool-support, universal-clients). No user-facing behavior to test for this milestone.
